---
title: "Qwen — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Qwen"
con = duckdb.connect()
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches", "project_metadata", "project_docs"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"qwen_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}')")

# Qwen brand: roxo/violeta
SOURCE_COLOR = "#615CED"
ACCENT = "#3D2A88"
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    fig = (go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
           if orientation == "h" else
           go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color)))
    fig.update_layout(title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
                      margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20))
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("SELECT MIN(created_at) AS oldest, MAX(created_at) AS newest FROM conversations").df()

n_proj = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_metadata").fetchone()[0]
n_docs = con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_docs").fetchone()[0]

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "project_metadata.parquet", "Rows": f"{n_proj:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "project_docs.parquet", "Rows": f"{n_docs:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico do Qwen.
> Descobertas-chave: 8 chat_types distintos (t2t, search, deep_research,
> t2i, t2v, artifacts, learn), pinned/archived flags, projects com
> custom_instruction, reasoning_content condicional ao modelo (R1-equivalente).

# 1. Conversations

```{python}
#| label: conv-overview

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        COUNT(project_id) AS in_project,
        COUNT(settings_json) AS with_settings
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]
def cv(f): return fmt_pct(int(cov[f].iloc[0]), int(total))

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "title", "Cobertura": cv("title")},
    {"Campo": "model", "Cobertura": cv("model")},
    {"Campo": "is_pinned", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['pinned'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_archived", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['archived'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "project_id", "Cobertura": cv("in_project")},
    {"Campo": "settings_json (meta + feature_config)", "Cobertura": cv("with_settings")},
]))
```

## 1.1 chat_type → mode (8 tipos)

```{python}
#| label: chat-types

modes = con.execute("""
    SELECT mode, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mode ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
fig = plotly_bar(x=modes["mode"], y=modes["n"],
                 title="Conversations por mode (mapeado de chat_type)",
                 height=300)
fig.show()
show_df(modes)
```

## 1.2 Top models

```{python}
#| label: top-models

top = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()
if not top.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=top["model"], y=top["n"], title="Top modelos", height=300)
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-30)
    fig.show()
```

# 2. Messages

```{python}
#| label: msg-stats

mc = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS with_thinking,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS with_files,
        COUNT(start_timestamp) AS with_block_ts,
        COUNT(citations_json) AS with_citations
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mc["total"].iloc[0]
def mv(f): return fmt_pct(int(mc[f].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "thinking (reasoning_content do modelo)", "Cobertura": mv("with_thinking")},
    {"Campo": "attachment_names (files)", "Cobertura": mv("with_files")},
    {"Campo": "start_timestamp/stop_timestamp (latencia)", "Cobertura": mv("with_block_ts")},
    {"Campo": "citations_json", "Cobertura": mv("with_citations")},
]))
```

## 2.1 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: msgs-by-role

by_role = con.execute("""
    SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS total,
           ROUND(AVG(word_count), 1) AS avg_words
    FROM messages GROUP BY role
""").df()
show_df(by_role)
```

# 3. ToolEvents

```{python}
#| label: tool-events

ev = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
if not ev.empty:
    show_df(ev)
    fig = plotly_bar(x=ev["event_type"], y=ev["n"],
                     title="ToolEvents por tipo", height=300)
    fig.show()
else:
    print("Nenhum tool_event nesta base.")
```

# 4. Branches

```{python}
#| label: branches

br = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS main,
        SUM((NOT is_active)::INT) AS secondary,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM branches
""").df()
show_df(br)
```

# 5. Projects

```{python}
#| label: projects

if n_proj > 0:
    proj = con.execute("""
        SELECT name, custom_instruction, files_count,
               strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
        FROM project_metadata ORDER BY files_count DESC
    """).df()
    show_df(proj)

if n_docs > 0:
    print("\n## Project docs")
    docs = con.execute("""
        SELECT file_name, content_size, substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS proj_id
        FROM project_docs ORDER BY content_size DESC
    """).df()
    show_df(docs)
```

# 6. Preservation

```{python}
#| label: preservation

p = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN is_preserved_missing THEN 'Preserved' ELSE 'Active' END AS status,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY is_preserved_missing
""").df()
show_df(p)
```

## 6.1 Pin / Temporary / Archived (cross-platform check)

```{python}
#| label: cross-platform-flags

ct = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        SUM(is_temporary::INT) AS temporary
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(ct)
```
